full_text:
Hu Zong (Weize) 胡綜 (偉則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Zong (胡綜), styledWeize (偉則), was born in Runan. Joined Sun Ce as a refugee, noted scholar for his liteary achievements. Hu Zong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Hu Zong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
